channel.title: +MT on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +MT on Vishvas's notes

item.title: The Census of Marine Life project
item.description: Source: here. A new-to-science goby fish from Guam The Census of Marine Life project has uncovered an interesting goby fish in Guam that forms a symbiosis with a snapping shrimp. The shrimp excavates a burrow, and the fish guards the borrow and uses it as a dwelling. The level of coordination between the two is unclear, but would definitely be of interest in terms of understanding macro-symbiosis. Scorpaenopsis eschmeyeri : A new scorpionfish
